div.h1: CI/CD — Git flow from feature branch to production
div.p: Azure DevOps · .sqlproj · DacFx · manual approval gates
Fabric DEV workspace SupplyChain_Warehouse_DEV Fast iteration Test data subset
Fabric PROD workspace SupplyChain_Warehouse Business data SLA-backed
Post-deploy validation • Run pl_master manually • Query sp_run_history • Check dq_results dashboard • Compare row counts v8 vs v9
VS Code + Claude Code Edit .sql files
CI pipeline azure-pipelines.yml • dotnet build • SQL unit tests • SqlCodeAnalysis
Manual Approval Gate DataHub Lead (Cherry) US Lead (Bob)
CD → DEV sqlpackage /Action:Publish auto-deploy on merge
CD → PROD sqlpackage /Action:Publish after approval only
